page_content:
Prerequisite: DANC148.

Repeatable to: 4 credits.

DANC158 Fundamentals of Jazz (2 Credits)

Introduction to the jazz style in dance for the beginning student. Restriction: Must not be in Dance program.

Repeatable to: 4 credits.

DANC179 Movement Integration (2 Credits)

Conditioning and re-patterning techniques for achieving integrated movement.
